response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including C, C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading large-scale experimentation or growth platforms, AI-driven feature rollout systems, or cross-team instrumentation frameworks required for the Principal role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) demonstrating architectural initiative.
Proven ability to work across languages and domains (C/C++, D, JS/TS, embedded) with a systems-thinking mindset.
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning enterprise-scale experimentation or feature-flagging platforms.
Limited visibility into metrics-driven decision-making, statistical analysis, or bias/risk controls in experimentation.
Lacks documented leadership in aligning cross-functional teams (Product, Data Science) on growth measurement systems.
